title: T-021 — UI: packing_station_workbench + packing_stations_selector + ship_confirm/pack_close modals (SHIP-017/030) (11-shipping-e)
prompt:
# T-021 — Packing Station UI

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-017 Packing Station Workbench, §15.4 SHIP-030 Packing Stations Selector, §15.4 SHIP-024 Ship Confirmation, §11 V-SHIP-PACK-*, V-SHIP-SHIP-*
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-017 Packing Station
Prototypes:
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx:4-45 (packing_stations_selector_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx:47-220 (packing_station_workbench_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:577-607 (pack_close_carton_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:609-700 (ship_confirm_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:792-807 (carrier_create_edit_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component pages + 3 modals for pack workflow (station selector → workbench → close box → ship confirm).

## GS1 prefix source
All SSCC labels read `organizations.gs1_company_prefix` from the organizations table (02-settings). Always read from organizations table, never from env config.

## Implementation contract
1. `/(shipping)/pack/page.tsx` (RSC) renders `packing_stations_selector_page` per prototype (4-45): list of `packing_stations` + their `printers` health status; user selects a station which sets a cookie/session var.
2. `/(shipping)/pack/[stationId]/page.tsx` renders `packing_station_workbench_page` (47-220): active pack session, assigned pick_list_lines, current carton, weighing scale read, sscc preview.
3. Modals:
   - `pack-close-carton-modal.tsx` (modals.jsx:577-607) — confirms box weight + content + triggers closeBox (T-020).
   - `ship-confirm-modal.tsx` (modals.jsx:609-700) — confirms shipment after BOL + sscc + QA checks; calls confirmShipment (T-020). Shows D365 push status panel (Phase 1 enqueued; Phase 2 cadence).
   - `carrier-create-edit-modal.tsx` (modals.jsx:792-807) — used in shipping settings.
4. Real-time: `packing_station_workbench_page` subscribes to `pack_session_updates` via SWR poll (5s) — Phase 1 simple polling (Phase 2 Realtime channel).
5. Permission gates: `ship.pack.close` for closeBox; `ship.ship.confirm` for ship-confirm modal.
6. Four states per page + i18n `shipping.pack.*`.

## Prototype parity
- pack-screens.jsx:4-45 (selector) — list rows with health status badge per printer
- pack-screens.jsx:47-220 (workbench) — pack session header + assigned lines + active carton + sscc preview + Close Box CTA + Confirm Shipment CTA
- modals.jsx:577-607 (close) — weight input + variance hint + Confirm button
- modals.jsx:609-700 (ship) — pre-flight checklist (sscc all assigned ✓, BOL generated ✓, no critical QA holds ✓, D365 outbox enqueue ✓) + Confirm button + last_synced_at
- modals.jsx:792-807 (carrier) — name/SCAC code/contact form

Known bug fix: BL-SHIP-14 (Ship confirm — DLQ kick button missing from retry cadence UI) — add `Replay DLQ` button visible to ship.dlq.replay holders.
Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/pack/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/pack/_components/station-selector.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/pack/[stationId]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/pack/[stationId]/_components/workbench.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/pack-close-carton-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/ship-confirm-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/carrier-create-edit-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/pack/__tests__/workbench.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx [ref]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the workbench renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx:47-220, then header + active carton + sscc preview + Close Box + Confirm Shipment CTAs match — RTL snapshot + Playwright screenshot.
2. Given ship-confirm-modal opens, when prerequisites are met (sscc all assigned, BOL generated, no critical QA holds), then Confirm button is enabled; when any failing, then Confirm is disabled with red row in checklist.
3. Given pack-close-carton-modal submits weight outside variance, when Zod runs, then V-SHIP-PACK-04 warning is shown and submit disabled (server still re-validates).
4. Given session has ship.dlq.replay permission, when ship-confirm-modal renders post-failure, then a Replay DLQ button is visible (BL-SHIP-14 fix).
5. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL asserting parity + checklist gating + variance Zod + permission gate + Replay DLQ visibility.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run pack/workbench.test.tsx`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-pack-flow.spec.ts` covers selector → workbench → close box → confirm shipment.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not perpetuate BL-SHIP-14.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe).
- Do not implement real-time channel in P1 (5s SWR poll only).

## BRCGS audit trail
POD/signed-BOL uploads store SHA-256 hash + retention_until = signed_at + 7 years (BRCGS Issue 9 §3.5 / §14.4).

pipeline_inputs.description: Packing station selector + workbench + 3 modals (pack-close-carton, ship-confirm, carrier-create-edit) + BL-SHIP-14 Replay DLQ button fix.
pipeline_inputs.details: P1 uses 5s SWR poll (Phase 2 Realtime channel). Ship-confirm checklist gates Confirm button on T-020 server-side re-validation. BL-SHIP-14 fix: Replay DLQ button visible to ship.dlq.replay holders.
out_of_scope: Do not implement scanner pack UI (06-SCANNER-P1 owns SHIP-018 per §15.2).
cross_module_dependencies: 09-quality/T-064 (consume gate — packing workbench calls holdsGuard before closeBox/confirmShipment; per 2026-05-14 audit)
acceptance_criteria: Given workbench renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx:47-220, then header + active carton + sscc preview (gs1_company_prefix from organizations, 02-settings) + CTAs match prototype (structural parity checklist).

Given ship-confirm-modal opens with all prerequisites met, when render, then Confirm enabled; when any prerequisite fails (including critical quality hold via 09-quality T-064 holdsGuard), then Confirm disabled with specific blocker tooltip.

Given pack-close submits weight outside variance, when Zod runs, then V-SHIP-PACK-04 warning shown and submit disabled; AND given ship.dlq.replay session post-failure, then Replay DLQ button visible; AND POD record stores SHA-256 hash + retention_until = now + 7y (BRCGS §3.5).
UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.
test_strategy: RED: RTL parity + checklist gating + variance Zod + permission gate + Replay DLQ visibility.
risk_red_lines: Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
Do not implement Realtime channel in P1.
Do not bypass the 09-quality consume gate (T-064 v_active_holds) — packing workbench must call holdsGuard before confirmShipment.
POD audit trail uses SHA-256 hash + 7-year retention (BRCGS Issue 9 §3.5) — do not allow truncation or premature deletion of confirmation records.
